title: blasters sci-fi series
description: datapack that adds star wars like blasters to minecraft
body:
this datapack adds two craftable blasters to minecraft. one red and one blue.

To use the blasters hold it in your hand and press right click (use Item place block keybind), 
red blaster will shoot red laser and blue blaster blue laser.
laser deals 10 damage (player has 20 health).

![blue blaster crafting recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0cb9c894a0134bd3dfca590046fd84b95bdfe0d1.png)


![red blaster crafting recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/56a86847c2b5c5f77e4571a35787a08573938a3f.png)
